item.title: Personality Psychology
item.description: This course is designed to make students understand how personality can influence behavior. This course will ask the students to understand personality theories by analysing a famous person auto/biography using their chosen personality theory. By the end of this course, students should be able to: - Identify particular characters of well-known personality approaches and aspects that bulid personality, also analyse students’ own experiences and recent research in personality - Explain behavior pattern and dynamics based on specific personality theories - Identify proper responses (cognitive, affective) referred to specific personality theories by having immediate experience - Explain individual differences based on personality theories and the immediate experience Available slides: - Freud’s Psychoanalysis - Eysenck’s Behavioural Genetics & McCrae & Costa’s Five Factor Model - The Dark Triad Personality & HEXACO - Cognitive & Humanistic Approaches

item.title: Course Materials
item.description: I will share all materials from all undergraduate courses I taught here to the public. Slides are licensed , so everyone is welcome to share and reproduce the slides. Here is the list of my taught courses in 2019: Even Semester (2018⁄2019) - Personality Psychology (Double Degree Programme - taught in English) - Quantitative Research Method and Data Analysis - Community Mental Health - Philosophy of Science - Human Philosophy

item.title: Research Methods
item.description: This feature can be used for publishing content such as: Project or software documentation Online courses Tutorials The parent folder may be renamed, for example, to docs for project documentation or course for creating an online course. To disable this feature, either delete the parent folder, or set draft = true in the front matter of all its pages. After renaming or deleting the parent folder, you may wish to update any [[menu.

item.title: Statistics
item.description: This feature can be used for publishing content such as: Project or software documentation Online courses Tutorials The parent folder may be renamed, for example, to docs for project documentation or course for creating an online course. To disable this feature, either delete the parent folder, or set draft = true in the front matter of all its pages. After renaming or deleting the parent folder, you may wish to update any [[menu.
